summary.description: One or two sentence overall assessment of the diff.

file.description: Path of the file this finding applies to, relative to repo root.

line.description: Line number the finding applies to, or null if it applies to the whole file.

message.description: Specific, actionable description of the issue. Never a generic 'consider improving this'.

is_new.description: False if this finding was already reported in a prior review pass and remains unaddressed — lets the pipeline avoid posting a duplicate PR comment.
